# Allowlist of files that legitimately reference src/kailash/ source paths.
# These files guide developers working WITH the kailash-py source tree
# (skill navigation, origin provenance, compliance tracking).
#
# CI validates .claude/ content doesn't contain src/kailash/ contamination
# EXCEPT in files listed here. One file path per line, relative to repo root.
# Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines ignored.
#
# Add a path here if a new skill/agent legitimately needs to reference
# kailash-py source (e.g., provenance for an Origin: line, or a skill
# that teaches developers how to navigate the SDK layout).
